steps.title: Spot the direct link
steps.content: The phrase “speaks directly to Mitchell's influence” explicitly ties Brown's book to Mitchell's philosophy, signaling the text's structure: a philosophical idea followed by its concrete embodiment.

steps.title: Match the structure
steps.content: D captures this exactly: a philosophy (Mitchell's view) followed by a book influenced by that philosophy (Goodnight Moon). A and B wrongly introduce debate and competing views; C misidentifies the content as characteristics of many books. That matches choice D — D is correct.
